fields.label: Token Hash (SHA-256)
fields.description: SHA-256 hex of the issued Bearer token. Plaintext token is returned ONCE at /gettoken response time and never persisted. Bearer middleware re-hashes incoming tokens and looks up by this column.

fields.label: EasyEcom Account
fields.description: Which EE Account this token authorises. /gettoken matches incoming Basic auth against any enabled Account's gsp_basic_auth_secret and stamps the matched Account here.

fields.label: Expires At
fields.description: issued_at + 1 hour per EE's contract. Bearer middleware rejects tokens past this.

fields.label: Issued To IP
fields.description: Source IP of the /gettoken request — audit only, not enforced (EE's server pool IPs may rotate).

fields.label: Last Used At
fields.description: Bumped on every successful Bearer validation. Helps detect dormant tokens for the cleanup scheduler.
